# cloudtemple_vpc_floating_ip (Data Source)

Used to retrieve a specific VPC floating IP.

To query this datasource you will need the `vpc_read` role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Read a floating IP using its ID
data "cloudtemple_vpc_floating_ip" "example" {
  id = "2a1c9d77-db89-4ab8-abba-48852d750df8"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the floating IP to retrieve.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the floating IP.
- `ip_address` (String) The floating IP address.
- `private_network_id` (String) The ID of the private network this floating IP is associated with, if any.
- `static_ip_address` (String) The address of the static IP this floating IP is bound to, if any.
- `static_ip_id` (String) The ID of the static IP this floating IP is bound to, if any.
- `vpc_id` (String) The ID of the VPC this floating IP is associated with, if any.
